title: Hidden Valley Road
author: Robert Kolker
subtopics: schizophrenia, family memoir, mental health, science
subline: Inside the mind of an American family.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- 12 child silhouettes in a 6x2 grid — representing the 12 Galvin children. 6 are ash (unaffected), 6 are RED (diagnosed with schizophrenia). The split is the book's mystery. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1100)" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">
    <!-- 6x2 grid: 6 across, 2 rows. Each child is a 120-tall simple bust -->
    <g stroke-width="1.5" fill="none">
      <!-- Row 1 (top, ages maybe 5-15, left-to-right) -->
      <g transform="translate(-600 0)">
        <circle cx="0" cy="-30" r="22" stroke="#cccccc"/>
        <path d="M -28 0 L -32 60 L 32 60 L 28 0 Z" stroke="#cccccc"/>
        <text x="0" y="100" font-size="12" fill="#cccccc" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="0.18em">PETER</text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(-400 0)">
        <circle cx="0" cy="-30" r="22" stroke="#fc1c46"/>
        <path d="M -28 0 L -32 60 L 32 60 L 28 0 Z" stroke="#fc1c46"/>
        <text x="0" y="100" font-size="12" fill="#fc1c46" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="0.18em">MICHAEL</text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(-200 0)">
        <circle cx="0" cy="-30" r="22" stroke="#cccccc"/>
        <path d="M -28 0 L -32 60 L 32 60 L 28 0 Z" stroke="#cccccc"/>
        <text x="0" y="100" font-size="12" fill="#cccccc" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="0.18em">MARK</text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(0 0)">
        <circle cx="0" cy="-30" r="22" stroke="#fc1c46"/>
        <path d="M -28 0 L -32 60 L 32 60 L 28 0 Z" stroke="#fc1c46"/>
        <text x="0" y="100" font-size="12" fill="#fc1c46" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="0.18em">PATRICK</text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(200 0)">
        <circle cx="0" cy="-30" r="22" stroke="#cccccc"/>
        <path d="M -28 0 L -32 60 L 32 60 L 28 0 Z" stroke="#cccccc"/>
        <text x="0" y="100" font-size="12" fill="#cccccc" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="0.18em">JOHN</text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(400 0)">
        <circle cx="0" cy="-30" r="22" stroke="#cccccc"/>
        <path d="M -28 0 L -32 60 L 32 60 L 28 0 Z" stroke="#cccccc"/>
        <text x="0" y="100" font-size="12" fill="#cccccc" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="0.18em">JAMES</text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(600 0)">
        <circle cx="0" cy="-30" r="22" stroke="#cccccc"/>
        <path d="M -28 0 L -32 60 L 32 60 L 28 0 Z" stroke="#cccccc"/>
        <text x="0" y="100" font-size="12" fill="#cccccc" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="0.18em">MATTHEW</text>
      </g>
      <!-- Row 2 (bottom) -->
      <g transform="translate(-600 240)">
        <circle cx="0" cy="-30" r="22" stroke="#fc1c46"/>
        <path d="M -28 0 L -32 60 L 32 60 L 28 0 Z" stroke="#fc1c46"/>
        <text x="0" y="100" font-size="12" fill="#fc1c46" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="0.18em">DAVID</text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(-400 240)">
        <circle cx="0" cy="-30" r="22" stroke="#cccccc"/>
        <path d="M -28 0 L -32 60 L 32 60 L 28 0 Z" stroke="#cccccc"/>
        <text x="0" y="100" font-size="12" fill="#cccccc" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="0.18em">MARY</text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(-200 240)">
        <circle cx="0" cy="-30" r="22" stroke="#cccccc"/>
        <path d="M -28 0 L -32 60 L 32 60 L 28 0 Z" stroke="#cccccc"/>
        <text x="0" y="100" font-size="12" fill="#cccccc" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="0.18em">NANCY</text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(0 240)">
        <circle cx="0" cy="-30" r="22" stroke="#fc1c46"/>
        <path d="M -28 0 L -32 60 L 32 60 L 28 0 Z" stroke="#fc1c46"/>
        <text x="0" y="100" font-size="12" fill="#fc1c46" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="0.18em">DONALD</text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(200 240)">
        <circle cx="0" cy="-30" r="22" stroke="#cccccc"/>
        <path d="M -28 0 L -32 60 L 32 60 L 28 0 Z" stroke="#cccccc"/>
        <text x="0" y="100" font-size="12" fill="#cccccc" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="0.18em">MARGARET</text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(400 240)">
        <circle cx="0" cy="-30" r="22" stroke="#fc1c46"/>
        <path d="M -28 0 L -32 60 L 32 60 L 28 0 Z" stroke="#fc1c46"/>
        <text x="0" y="100" font-size="12" fill="#fc1c46" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="0.18em">BRIAN</text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(600 240)">
        <circle cx="0" cy="-30" r="22" stroke="#cccccc"/>
        <path d="M -28 0 L -32 60 L 32 60 L 28 0 Z" stroke="#cccccc"/>
        <text x="0" y="100" font-size="12" fill="#cccccc" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="0.18em">LINDSAY</text>
      </g>
    </g>
    <!-- A whisper label -->
    <text x="0" y="460" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">THE GALVIN FAMILY · 6 OF 12 DIAGNOSED</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: 12 child silhouettes in a 7x2 grid, each with a first name. 6 are ash (unaffected), 6 are RED (diagnosed with schizophrenia). The randomness of the red is the book's mystery. 220px whisper title at the bottom.
